common.title: Tabibak - Your Medical Platform in Jordan
common.description: Choose your doctor or hospital in Jordan with confidence before booking or traveling for treatment. The premier medical tourism platform in Jordan.

home.hero_title: Choose your doctor or hospital in Jordan with confidence before booking or traveling
home.hero_subtitle: An integrated national platform connecting patients from inside and outside Jordan with the best medical expertise and accredited hospitals, offering direct booking and medical tourism coordination services for free.
home.search_doctor_placeholder: Search doctor by name, specialty, or city...
home.featured_doctors_sub: Distinguished consultants and specialists accredited in Jordan
home.featured_hospitals_sub: Internationally accredited hospitals equipped with the latest technologies
home.popular_specialties_sub: Browse doctors by the required medical specialty
home.why_jordan_1_desc: Consultant doctors holding American, British Boards and international fellowships.
home.why_jordan_2_desc: Hospitals accredited by Joint Commission International (JCI) and national standards.
home.why_jordan_3_desc: Excellent economic treatment prices compared to advanced countries.
home.why_jordan_4_desc: Combine treatment with relaxation in Dead Sea, Ma'in Hot Springs, and Petra.
home.how_it_works_1: Search and compare doctors, hospitals, and consultation fees.
home.how_it_works_2: Submit your medical reports or condition details for free.
home.how_it_works_3: Receive a treatment plan and complete coordination for your medical trip.
home.cta_title: Are you a doctor or a hospital?
home.cta_desc: Join the Tabibak network now and enhance your digital presence to receive local and international patients.

doctors.title: Doctors Directory in Jordan
doctors.subtitle: Search and compare leading doctors and consultants by specialty, city, and rating.
doctors.no_doctors: No doctors found matching the search filters.
doctors.contact_request_desc: Your contact request will be logged, and the doctor/clinic will contact you shortly.

hospitals.title: Hospitals & Medical Centers in Jordan
hospitals.subtitle: Explore the best medical tourism destinations, accredited hospitals, and international patient care.
hospitals.no_hospitals: No hospitals found matching the search filters.

packages.title: Subscription Packages for Providers
packages.subtitle: The platform is completely free for patients. We offer doctors and hospitals premium subscription packages that ensure better visibility and communication channels.
packages.patient_free_notice: Important Note: Using the platform, booking appointments, and requesting treatment plans is 100% free for patients with no hidden fees.
packages.hidden_leads_notice: You have unread leads this month! Upgrade your package to reveal patient contact info and enable direct calls.

free_doctor: Additional leads logged in a hidden counter
premium_doctor: Reveal direct call and WhatsApp button for visitors
vip_doctor: Top priority search visibility in specialty & city
premium_hospital: Show media photos & videos of facilities
Link affiliated doctors to profile page
intl_hospital: Top promotion priority for international patients
Featured on Medical Tourism promotion pages
Display translation, hotel, and airport pickup services

forms.intl_title: Request Treatment Plan & Medical Tourism in Jordan
forms.condition_desc: Detailed Description of Condition & Current Diagnosis
forms.consent: I agree to share my medical reports and information securely and confidentially only with authorized medical providers.
forms.success_message: Your request has been successfully submitted! This is a mock/MVP demonstration model, and our team will get in touch with you shortly to coordinate the details.

dashboard.placeholder_desc: This page represents a visual prototype and mockup of the dashboard. It will be linked with real databases and authorization in Phase 2.
dashboard.leads_hidden_alert: You have {count} hidden contact requests because you exceeded your free package monthly limit. Upgrade your subscription to reveal patient contact info.
